steps.label: Applets with directional derivatives
steps.bodyHtml:
<geogebra width="800" height="500" perspective="3D">
  f(x,y)=(x^2/5)+y^2
  A(1,1,f(1,1))
  p:z=f(1,1)
  Intersect(f,p)
</geogebra>
 <geogebra width="800" height="500" perspective="2D">
  eq:(x^2/5)+y^2=6/5
  gr: Vector((1,1),(1,1)+(1/5,1))
  (1/5)(x-1)+(y-1)=0
</geogebra>
